message:
fix(acfs-global,acfs-update): drop state files that don't match the requested TARGET_HOME

Follow-up to the previous "drop user-controlled ACFS_BIN_DIR
fallback" fix. That commit narrowed which state-file candidates
were considered, but the loop that consumed them still trusted any
file in the candidate list. On a machine with multiple acfs
installations (different users, different homes), passing
`--target $other_user` could still resolve a bin_dir from
$current_home/.acfs/state.json or from
${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}'s pre-existing-but-stale value when the
candidate path didn't actually correspond to the requested
target_home.

Add a helper:

    state_file_matches_target_home <state_file> <expected_home>

that:
  - cheaply derives state_home from the path itself when it ends
    in `.acfs/state.json` (sanitized abs-non-root path of the
    parent of `.acfs`),
  - falls back to reading `target_home` out of the file's JSON
    (via the existing read_target_home_from_state_file helper),
  - returns 0 iff the resulting state_home equals the
    sanitized expected_home.

The candidate-loop in `main()` of both wrappers now skips a state
file if TARGET_HOME was explicitly requested and the candidate
file doesn't match (`continue` early). When no TARGET_HOME was
asked for, behavior is unchanged — the previous narrowing already
ensured we wouldn't accidentally pull in a current_home state
file in that case.

Pure narrowing — every previous resolution that *did* match
expected_home still resolves the same way. Both wrappers
(scripts/acfs-global and scripts/acfs-update) get the same helper
+ the same loop guard so they stay symmetrical.

tests/unit/test_changelog_export_status.sh
  Two new regression cases:
    - Build a state-file candidate whose internal target_home
      points at a different user's home, and one whose path-
      derived state_home points at yet a third home.
    - Drive the wrappers with `--target $expected_user` and
      assert ACFS_BIN_DIR resolves only against the file that
      actually matches the requested target_home.

files.patch:
@@ -220,6 +220,26 @@ read_bin_dir_from_state_file() {
     return 1
 }
 
+state_file_matches_target_home() {
+    local state_file="$1"
+    local expected_home="$2"
+    local state_home=""
+
+    [[ -n "$state_file" ]] || return 1
+    expected_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$expected_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    [[ -n "$expected_home" ]] || return 1
+
+    if [[ "$state_file" == */.acfs/state.json ]]; then
+        state_home="${state_file%/.acfs/state.json}"
+        state_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$state_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    else
+        state_home="$(read_target_home_from_state_file "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    fi
+
+    [[ -n "$state_home" ]] || return 1
+    [[ "$state_home" == "$expected_home" ]]
+}
+
 find_acfs_bin_from_state_file() {
     local state_file="$1"
     local state_home=""
@@ -647,15 +667,20 @@ main() {
 
     if [[ -z "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]]; then
         local state_candidate=""
+        local expected_home=""
         state_candidates=(
             "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}"
             "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}"
         )
         if [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && [[ -z "${TARGET_HOME:-}" || "$current_home" == "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]]; then
             state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
         fi
+        expected_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${TARGET_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
         for state_candidate in "${state_candidates[@]}"; do
             [[ -n "$state_candidate" && -f "$state_candidate" ]] || continue
+            if [[ -n "$expected_home" ]] && ! state_file_matches_target_home "$state_candidate" "$expected_home"; then
+                continue
+            fi
             ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"
             [[ -n "$ACFS_BIN_DIR" ]] && break
         done

@@ -224,6 +224,26 @@ read_bin_dir_from_state_file() {
   return 1
 }
 
+state_file_matches_target_home() {
+  local state_file="$1"
+  local expected_home="$2"
+  local state_home=""
+
+  [[ -n "$state_file" ]] || return 1
+  expected_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$expected_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  [[ -n "$expected_home" ]] || return 1
+
+  if [[ "$state_file" == */.acfs/state.json ]]; then
+    state_home="${state_file%/.acfs/state.json}"
+    state_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$state_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  else
+    state_home="$(read_target_home_from_state_file "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+  fi
+
+  [[ -n "$state_home" ]] || return 1
+  [[ "$state_home" == "$expected_home" ]]
+}
+
 find_update_script_for_state_file() {
   local state_file="$1"
   local state_home=""
@@ -722,15 +742,20 @@ main() {
 
   if [[ -z "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" ]]; then
     local state_candidate=""
+    local expected_home=""
     state_candidates=(
       "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}"
       "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}"
     )
     if [[ -n "$current_home" ]] && [[ -z "${TARGET_HOME:-}" || "$current_home" == "${TARGET_HOME:-}" ]]; then
       state_candidates+=("$current_home/.acfs/state.json")
     fi
+    expected_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${TARGET_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
     for state_candidate in "${state_candidates[@]}"; do
       [[ -n "$state_candidate" && -f "$state_candidate" ]] || continue
+      if [[ -n "$expected_home" ]] && ! state_file_matches_target_home "$state_candidate" "$expected_home"; then
+        continue
+      fi
       ACFS_BIN_DIR="$(read_bin_dir_from_state_file "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"
       [[ -n "$ACFS_BIN_DIR" ]] && break
     done

@@ -6282,6 +6282,60 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_system_state_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution() {
+    setup_mock_env
+
+    TEST_FAKE_BIN="$TEST_HOME/fake-bin"
+    local current_home="$TEST_HOME/current-home"
+    local stale_home="$TEST_HOME/stale-home"
+    local stale_bin="$TEST_HOME/stale-bin"
+    local current_user=""
+    local system_state="$TEST_HOME/system-state.json"
+
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+    mkdir -p \
+        "$TEST_FAKE_BIN" \
+        "$current_home/.acfs/scripts/lib" \
+        "$stale_bin" \
+        "$TEST_HOME/probe"
+
+    cat > "$current_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$current_home"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$current_home/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'TARGET_HOME=%s ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s ARG1=%s\n' "${TARGET_HOME:-}" "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${1:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$current_home/.acfs/scripts/lib/update.sh"
+    cat > "$system_state" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$stale_home",
+  "bin_dir": "$stale_bin"
+}
+EOF
+
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-update" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$current_home" PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" \
+        ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$system_state" \
+        /bin/bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs-update" --help 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "TARGET_HOME=$current_home ACFS_BIN_DIR= ARG1=--help" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "acfs-update wrapper ignores stale system-state bin_dir after runtime resolution"
+    else
+        harness_fail "acfs-update wrapper ignores stale system-state bin_dir after runtime resolution" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -6839,6 +6893,61 @@ EOF
     cleanup_mock_env
 }
 
+test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_system_state_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution() {
+    setup_mock_env
+
+    TEST_FAKE_BIN="$TEST_HOME/fake-bin"
+    local current_home="$TEST_HOME/current-home"
+    local stale_home="$TEST_HOME/stale-home"
+    local stale_bin="$TEST_HOME/stale-bin"
+    local current_user=""
+    local system_state="$TEST_HOME/system-state.json"
+
+    current_user="$(id -un 2>/dev/null || whoami 2>/dev/null || true)"
+
+    mkdir -p \
+        "$TEST_FAKE_BIN" \
+        "$current_home/.acfs" \
+        "$current_home/.local/bin" \
+        "$stale_bin" \
+        "$TEST_HOME/probe"
+
+    cat > "$current_home/.acfs/state.json" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$current_home"
+}
+EOF
+    cat > "$current_home/.local/bin/acfs" <<'EOF'
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+printf 'TARGET_HOME=%s ACFS_BIN_DIR=%s ARG1=%s\n' "${TARGET_HOME:-}" "${ACFS_BIN_DIR:-}" "${1:-}"
+EOF
+    chmod +x "$current_home/.local/bin/acfs"
+    cat > "$system_state" <<EOF
+{
+  "target_user": "$current_user",
+  "target_home": "$stale_home",
+  "bin_dir": "$stale_bin"
+}
+EOF
+
+    cp "$REPO_ROOT/scripts/acfs-global" "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+    chmod +x "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs"
+
+    local output=""
+    output=$(HOME="$current_home" PATH="$TEST_FAKE_BIN:/usr/bin:/bin" \
+        ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE="$system_state" \
+        /bin/bash "$TEST_HOME/probe/acfs" version 2>&1)
+
+    if [[ "$output" == "TARGET_HOME=$current_home ACFS_BIN_DIR= ARG1=version" ]]; then
+        harness_pass "global acfs wrapper ignores stale system-state bin_dir after runtime resolution"
+    else
+        harness_fail "global acfs wrapper ignores stale system-state bin_dir after runtime resolution" "$output"
+    fi
+
+    cleanup_mock_env
+}
+
 test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user() {
     setup_mock_env
 
@@ -8179,6 +8288,7 @@ main() {
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_explicit_acfs_home_when_system_state_points_to_live_install || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_prefers_explicit_acfs_home_over_current_home_when_system_state_is_missing || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
+    test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_system_state_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
     test_acfs_update_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_uses_system_state_target_home_when_getent_unavailable || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_repairs_runtime_home_on_direct_exec || true
@@ -8192,6 +8302,7 @@ main() {
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_explicit_acfs_home_when_system_state_points_to_live_install || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_prefers_explicit_acfs_home_over_current_home_when_system_state_is_missing || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_poisoned_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
+    test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_system_state_bin_dir_after_runtime_resolution || true
     test_acfs_global_wrapper_ignores_stale_home_adjacent_target_user || true
     test_doctor_agent_checks_use_target_context_under_root_home || true
     test_doctor_agent_checks_prefer_persisted_bin_dir_over_poisoned_env_bin_dir || true
